document.source_title: NEET-UG 2026 re-exam to be held on June 21, says National Testing Agency

claims.claim_text: The NEET-UG 2026 re-exam will be held on June 21.
claims.evidence_text: The National Testing Agency has announced that the retest for NEET-UG 2026 will be held on June 21.

claims.claim_text: Over 22 lakh students are expected to face the re-exam.
claims.evidence_text: Over 22 lakh students are expected to face the re-exam.

claims.claim_text: The NEET-UG 2026 exam was cancelled due to a paper leak.
claims.evidence_text: The NEET-UG 2026 paper leak forced the NTA to scrap the exam that more than 22 lakh students sat for on May 3, 2026.

entities.name: National Testing Agency
entities.description: The agency responsible for conducting the NEET-UG exam.
entities.evidence_text: The National Testing Agency has announced that the retest for NEET-UG 2026 will be held on June 21.

entities.name: Government of India
entities.description: The central government of India that approved the re-examination.
entities.evidence_text: The National Testing Agency, with the approval of the Government of India, has scheduled the re-examination.

entities.name: Dharmendra Pradhan
entities.description: Union Education Minister who addressed the media after the exam cancellation.
entities.evidence_text: Pradhan addressed the media. In his first public remarks after the NEET-UG exam was cancelled.

events.evidence_text: The retest for NEET-UG 2026 will be held on June 21.
The NEET-UG 2026 paper leak forced the NTA to scrap the exam that more than 22 lakh students sat for on May 3, 2026.

metrics.name: number of students
metrics.evidence_text: Over 22 lakh students are expected to face the re-exam.

citations.title: NEET-UG 2026 re-exam to be held on June 21, says National Testing Agency

source_credibility.reason: The information is reported by a reputable news agency.
